items.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
items.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

items.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
items.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed,

items.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
items.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

items.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
items.summary: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

items.title: 匈牙利总统签署《基本法》修正案 其任期将终止
items.summary: 当地时间18日，匈牙利总统舒尤克在社交媒体发布视频表示，他已签署《基本法》第十七次修正案。这意味着，其任期即将终止，国会将于30天内选举产生新总统。

items.title: 全球首个、自研首颗！本周中国硬核成果密集“上新”
items.summary: 全球首个千亿参数级气象大模型开源

items.title: 比利时拟禁止进口以色列非法定居点产品
items.summary: 中新社布鲁塞尔7月18日电 (记者 德永健)比利时政府18日宣布将制定贸易禁令，禁止进口以色列非法定居点产品。

items.title: 伊朗袭击驻约旦美军致两人阵亡一人失踪
items.summary: 中新社华盛顿7月18日电 (记者 陈孟统)美军中央司令部18日发布声明称，美军17日在约旦抵御伊朗弹道导弹和无人机袭击期间，有两名美军人员阵亡，另有一人失踪。

items.title: 王毅分别会见印尼、莱索托、多米尼克客人
items.summary: 新华社上海7月18日电(记者冯歆然、周蕊)中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅18日在上海分别会见来华出席世界人工智能大会的印度尼西亚经济统筹部长艾尔朗加、莱索托外交大臣陶、多米尼克外长亨德森。

items.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
items.summary: Iran and the US have traded strikes as hostilities re-escalated this week, with Tehran targeting US military facilities across the Gulf region.

items.title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.

items.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
items.summary: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire condition

items.title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
items.summary: Jens Spahn faced criticism over his use of a surrogate, a ban on which he previously backed.

items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".
